_comment: FormaComposition — Theme Template. The theme defines musical identity. Multiple compositions can share one theme.

theme.name: Untitled Theme
theme._comment_key: Any note: C, C#, D, Eb, E, F, F#, G, Ab, A, Bb, B
theme._comment_mode: ionian (major, bright) | dorian (dark+warm) | phrygian (spanish, dark) | lydian (floating, luminous) | mixolydian (bluesy, rock) | aeolian (minor, melancholic) | locrian (unstable, tense)
theme._comment_motif: The melodic seed. Hand-craft intervals or use phrase (below) for prosody. If both exist, motif wins.

motif.name: my_motif
motif._comment_intervals: Semitone steps between notes. Positive = up, negative = down. Hum a phrase, write the movement.
motif._comment_rhythm: Duration in beats per note. 1.0 = quarter, 0.5 = eighth, 2.0 = half.
motif._valid_transforms: inversion | retrograde | augmentation | diminution | transpose_up | transpose_down | shuffle | expand | compress | retrograde_inversion

theme._comment_phrase: Alternative to motif. A word or phrase whose speech rhythm becomes the melodic seed. Uses CMU Pronouncing Dictionary.
theme._comment_prosodic_rhythm: When true + phrase is set, all voices derive rhythmic impulse from the phrase's stress pattern.
theme._comment_notes: Free text for your own reference.
